title: 10 Pcs S Hooks, 13cm Large S Shaped Hook, S Hooks for Hanging, Multi Purpose Stainless Steel Heavy Duty Metal S Hook for Hanging, for Kitchen Bathroom Bedroom Living Room Office Pan Cup
features: 【Stainless Steel Material】S hooks are made of stainless steel, s hooks have strong, rust-proof, waterproof, anti-fall and not easy to deform the characteristics, you can rest assured to use s hooks.
【Firm】Stainless steel hook is very strong, stainless steel hook will not break easily, you can rest assured with stainless steel hook to hang what you want to hang.
【Strong Bearing Capacity】Hook’s quality is very good, hook’s load-bearing is very strong, do not worry that hook can not hang heavy objects, hook’s maximum weight can reach 15kg.

【No Glue or Nails Needed】Multi purpose hook doesn't need glue or nails to hold multi purpose hook in place, you just need to hang multi purpose hook on a weight-bearing pole, cabinet, table, etc., and you can use multi purpose hook to hang things.

【Multifunction】Metal s hooks can hang many things, such as kitchen utensils, spoons, pans, POTS, coffee cups, bags, towels, plants, tools, clothes and so on. Metal s hooks can be used both indoors and out.
